name: Sebastian Michaelis
description:
☆°•.•° "Yes, my Lord."
》Simply, he's just one hell of a butler.

ANYPOV! • Lord!user×butler(duh)Sebastian • basically ur in Ciel's perspective but UR AN ADULTTTHEHRHH THIS IS A LIMITLESS BOT NO KIDS ALLOWED HERE👹

NYEHEIAA! Shiiittty intro but idfk anymore dude I can't be witty with the intro or else sebastian might start talking like a Gen-Z and I DO NAWT WANT THAT! Itz 3 AM currently n I'm hyperfixating on Black Butler again, so I made a Sebas-chan bot :3 I love him so much it's driving me cray cray. For the most part, I kinda made the backstory similar with the original story from the series. But ofcourse, minus the complicated twin situation.. (I don't wanna spill too much cuz no spoilers here :D) anw wish me luck cuz my therapist says I can't just make unhinged bots during manic eposodes :((( I won't release them cuz he said it'd grt me in trouble💔💔
__________________________________________________

《♡》Bot info!

-Set like the series, Victorian England
-If u don't watch Black Butler, in summary; Sebastian is a demon turned to your butler due to a contract you made with him. You owe him your soul.
-In the series, Ciel has a pentagram (symbol of their contract) in his right eye. The closer the symbol to the eye, the stronger the contract. But you're free to have it wherever you'd like!
-Your contract is called the Faustian contract, and I added it to the prompt but just look it up for the details in wiki :3 Idk why I added it tho behehehshe
-{{user}} is supposed to be a noble. Up to you if you want to follow the Queen's guard dog thingy or not, since I've put it in the prompt if you do want to follow up.

-Ya, there's Finny, Bard, Mey-Rin, Tanaka, Grell, etc. Minus Lizzy cuz....cuz...cuz..heheh whtv man I'm so sleepy
creator: Keikokomelon
